error_message: pytest collection failed with ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'sse_starlette' when run outside the backend uv environment
root_cause: The shell Python did not have backend dependencies installed; the project dependencies are available through the uv-managed backend environment.
fix: Use `rtk uv run pytest ...` from backend/ for backend tests.

error_message: GET /agents in Vite dev returned index.html instead of JSON
root_cause: The Vite dev proxy listed /projects, /runs, and /run, but not /agents, so the request fell through to the SPA fallback.
fix: Added /agents to the Vite proxy table.

error_message: Codex health tests ignored monkeypatched _CODEX_HOME and read the real ~/.codex account
root_cause: _codex_account used _CODEX_HOME as a default argument, so Python captured the original path at function definition time.
fix: Changed the function default to None and resolved _CODEX_HOME inside the function body.
